omitted_declarations.policy_reference: • Zendesk: to provide users with an efficient way to communicate with Cardinal Blue Software (about the usage of PicCollage Services), we use Zendesk, a customer service platform, to receive your feedback and offer timely responses to any questions you have. Please note we will receive your IP address and email address when you try to contact us through Zendesk.

2. Content you create. We receive the content of your creations while you are using the app in order to provide services to you. This may include photos and videos you are using as part of your designs, the order and structure that you are placing them in your designs, as well as their attached metadata. If you upload photos that include children under the age of 13, you must obtain permission from a parent or legal guardian before submitting such content.
